creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 193298
svn diff to add LICENSE

I was working on a port that I needed to add converters/base64
as a BUILD_DEPENDS, and found this didn't have a LICENSE
declared. So I added it.

CHANGES
 o add LICENSE
 o add LICENSE_FILE

That's it!

See svn diff (patch) attached.

--Chris
